# ClearPath Pediatrics

> ClearPath Pediatrics is a private, RN-led pediatric care navigation and health education service for families of medically complex or chronically ill children. Based in Phoenix, Arizona, services are delivered virtually nationwide. ClearPath helps parents understand care instructions, organize medications and appointments, prepare for provider visits, and feel confident between medical visits. ClearPath is NOT a medical practice and does NOT provide medical care, diagnosis, treatment, prescriptions, or emergency services — all clinical decisions remain with the child's licensed healthcare providers.

## Key facts
- Company: ClearPath Pediatrics, LLC
- Location: Phoenix, Arizona (services delivered virtually across the United States)
- Phone: (949) 416-5447
- Email: admin@clearpathpediatrics.com
- Website: https://clearpathpediatrics.com
- Tagline: "Clarity for families. Confidence between visits."
- Led by experienced pediatric Registered Nurses (RNs)
- HIPAA-aligned, private-pay (does not bill insurance; HSA/FSA may be eligible)
- Free iOS app available on the Apple App Store (id6762391088)

## What ClearPath does
- Translates complex medical instructions into clear, manageable steps
- Organizes medications, dosing schedules, and appointments in one place
- Prepares families for specialist visits (questions to ask, what to track)
- Teaches "red flag" escalation guidance (when to call, when to go to the ER, when to wait)
- Sets up a professional Medical Care Binder with emergency summaries and advocacy tools
- Coordinates tracking across multiple specialists and providers
- Provides ongoing RN check-ins and secure messaging between visits

## Who ClearPath supports
- Families managing chronic pediatric conditions
- Families recently discharged from the hospital
- Families navigating multiple specialists
- Parents who feel overwhelmed, uncertain, or unprepared between appointments

## Services & pricing
- Care Binder Setup: $97 one-time — complete medical organization system with guided setup
- Essentials Membership: $149/month — one 30-min RN check-in/month, personalized care navigation plan, medication education, secure messaging (business hours), appointment-prep templates, red flag education
- Guided Care Membership: $249/month — two 30-min RN check-ins/month, priority messaging, post-discharge follow-up, specialist coordination, ongoing care plan updates (includes everything in Essentials)
- Intensive Support: $399/month — weekly 30-min RN check-ins, same-business-day messaging, complex care navigation, comprehensive care binder creation, emergency-prep education (includes everything in lower tiers)
- Every plan includes free access to the ClearPath app. Memberships are month-to-month and can be cancelled anytime.

## How it works
1. Schedule a free 30-minute consultation (no obligation)
2. Get a personalized care navigation plan built around your child's diagnosis, providers, and medications
3. Ongoing RN check-ins and between-visit support (secure messaging, appointment prep)
4. Feel organized, prepared, and confident over time

## Important boundaries
- Not a medical provider, hospital, clinic, or health plan; not a HIPAA-covered entity (applies HIPAA-aligned standards voluntarily)
- Does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, prescriptions, or emergency services
- Does not attend appointments or communicate directly with the child's doctors on the family's behalf
- For any medical emergency, call 911 or go to the nearest emergency room
